name: Ivory Kurta with Handwoven Blue Jacket
description: A minimal white kurta-pyjama set enhanced by a rich blue multicolor Nehru jacket, ideal for Haldi or Mehendi functions.
stylistNotes: Wear with mojdis or kolhapuris. Add a pocket brooch for extra flair.
materialCare: Gentle hand wash or dry clean. Steam iron recommended.

name: Floral Festive Kurta Jacket Set
description: Vibrant maroon kurta combined with a striking embroidered floral jacket, perfect for Sangeet or Mehendi.
stylistNotes: Looks great with black trousers and leather sandals or mojaris.
materialCare: Dry clean only to preserve embroidery.

name: Royal Blue Embroidered Kurta Set
description: Luxuriously embroidered navy sherwani with intricate patterns, ideal for grooms or reception events.
stylistNotes: Pair with black juttis and a gold brooch. Add a matching stole for more drama.

name: Minimal White Kurta with Teal Jacket
description: Sleek white kurta-churidar set paired with a textured teal jacket, ideal for poojas or intimate functions.
stylistNotes: Keep accessories light for an elegant and clean appearance.
materialCare: Hand wash kurta, dry clean jacket.

name: Golden Mirror Work Sherwani
description: Exquisite beige-golden sherwani adorned with mirror and thread work, perfect for wedding day wear.
stylistNotes: Pairs well with beige juttis and gold accessories.
materialCare: Handle with care. Strictly dry clean only.
